[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111111 a
1 11111000 5
2 00001111 4
3 11010111 6
4 10111010 5
5 11111100 6
6 01010000 2
7 01111101 6

01 10 10111010 5 match 4
12 21 00101111 5
23 32 11100111 6

45 54 01101101 5
56 65 01000110 3
67 76 10101100 4
70 07 00101101 4

13 31 11001000 3

60 06 10000001 2

61 16 00111011 5
72 27 10111000 4

26 62 00010100 2
37 73 01011111 6
